name: Fried Rice with Peppery Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onions and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
3. Add the garlic and continue to stir-fry for a few minutes until both are golden.
4. Add the beans and curry paste and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
5. Add the rice and soy sauce and stir-fry until hot through, being careful not to overcook.
6. Serve with the garnishes.
